metadata.title: ACM-2020 | Specialized Asbestos and Radon Gas Consultancy
metadata.description: ACM-2020: Over 25 years of experience in asbestos management and radon gas measurement. RERA 86/AB/09 certification. Protecting public health and the environment.
metadata.keywords: asbestos, radon gas, environmental consultancy, asbestos removal, Barcelona, RERA, public health
metadata.ogTitle: ACM-2020 | Specialized Asbestos and Radon Gas Consultancy
metadata.ogDescription: Over 25 years protecting public health and the environment. Experts in asbestos and radon gas.

hero.subtitle: Specialized consultancy in comprehensive asbestos management and radon gas measurement. Professional solutions for businesses, public administrations, and individuals.

services.title: Specialized solutions for your
services.subtitle: We offer comprehensive services in asbestos management and radon gas control, tailored to the needs of each client.
services.asbestosSubtitle: Comprehensive services for safe ACM management
services.radonSubtitle: Indoor radon gas measurement and control

inspection.title: Inspection & Identification
inspection.description: Location and assessment of asbestos-containing materials in buildings and facilities.

management.title: Management Plans
management.description: Development of ACM management plans in compliance with current regulations.

projects.title: Asbestos Removal Projects
projects.description: Drafting of technical projects for the safe removal of asbestos-containing materials.

waste.title: Waste Management
waste.description: Guidance on the proper disposal and transportation of asbestos waste.

supervision.title: Site Supervision
supervision.description: Technical supervision of asbestos removal works ensuring safety.

risk.title: Risk Assessment
risk.description: Analysis of occupational risks related to asbestos exposure.

censuses.title: Municipal Censuses
censuses.description: Asbestos censuses in buildings and infrastructure.

water.title: Asbestos in Water
water.description: Analysis of asbestos fibers in water supply systems.

communities.title: Residential Communities
communities.description: Asbestos detection and management in residential communities.

measurement.title: Radon Gas Measurement
measurement.description: Precise measurements of radon concentration in buildings and homes.

residential.title: Residential Solutions
residential.description: Diagnosis and solutions for homes with elevated radon levels.

workspace.title: Workspaces
workspace.description: Radon assessment in workplaces according to Royal Decree 1029/2022.

reports.title: Technical Reports
reports.description: Preparation of detailed reports with action recommendations.

howto.title: How to Measure Radon
howto.description: Guide on detecting and measuring radon gas.

services.whySubtitle: We have the experience, certifications, and commitment needed to guarantee your safety and peace of mind.
whyItems: Over 25 years of experience in the sector

about.title: For public health and the
about.description1: ACM-2020 is a consultancy specialized in comprehensive asbestos management and radon gas control. We were founded with a commitment to protecting people's health and contributing to environmental preservation.
about.description2: Our team of professionals has extensive experience and specific training to offer solutions tailored to each situation, ensuring compliance with current regulations and the highest quality standards.

rera.title: RERA Certification
rera.description: Company registered under number 86/AB/09 in the Registry of Companies with Asbestos Risk.

experience.title: +25 Years of Experience
experience.description: Over two decades of professional experience in the environmental consultancy sector.

team.title: Specialized Team
team.description: Qualified professionals with continuous training on the latest regulations and techniques.

health.title: Health Commitment
health.description: Our priority is to protect people's health and preserve the environment.

about.missionText: To contribute to the protection of public health and the preservation of the environment through specialized consultancy services in asbestos management and radon gas control, with the highest standards of quality and professionalism.

clients.title: They trust
clients.subtitle: We work with companies, public administrations, and individuals who value professionalism and commitment to safety.
clients.sectorsSubtitle: Our experience spans multiple sectors, adapting our services to the specific needs of each client.
